utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I still can not believe they took away my key . You trust me with yours .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Of course I do ! And I am gonna give it back to you as soon as they are done with it at the key shining place .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Whoa ! Whoa ! Whoa ! Treeger , what are you doing ?

utterances.speaker: Mr. Treeger
utterances.text: You said there was a gas leak in here .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well why do not you use your key ?

utterances.speaker: Mr. Treeger
utterances.text: Because by the time I find it on this thing , the whole place might have exploded .

utterances.speaker: Mr. Treeger
utterances.text: If that happens at another building that I manage , people are gonna start asking questions .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh ! We could have done that .
